infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: OpenRacer uses your location to show your boat's position, speed, and heading while racing or cruising.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: OpenRacer uses your location to show your boat's position, speed, and heading while racing or cruising.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: OpenRacer uses the camera to scan committee-boat QR codes for course push and trust exchange.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: OpenRacer uses your location to show your boat's position, speed, and heading.

plugins.cameraPermission: OpenRacer uses the camera to scan committee-boat QR codes for course push.
